rows.name: Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger
rows.note: Keychron V6 Ultra HE VIP reservation window runs through July 21 ahead of a Kickstarter launch; Hall effect keeps consolidating as the default gaming-board expectation.

rows.name: Keychron
rows.note: Orca Echo crowdfunding topped a new GIZMART platform GMV record five days in; the campaign stays open through August 31.

rows.name: Split / Ergo
rows.note: Orca Echo's record-setting GMV keeps split-plus-trackball layouts in front-page discussion as the campaign runs through August.

rows.name: HMX Cloud V2
rows.note: Still broadly in stock across the usual vendors; no new review or restock catalyst this week.

rows.name: Mode Designs
rows.note: Summer update posted covering Sonnet/Encore shipping status and Prologue 98% prototype-testing progress; no new GB dated yet.

rows.name: 75% Layout
rows.note: Steady evergreen interest continues; no major new 75% launch this week to move the needle either way.

rows.name: Gateron Oil King
rows.note: Community benchmark linear holding steady at its usual price point; no new reviews or restocks in W27.

rows.name: Gateron Lanes
rows.note: Prior review-cycle attention keeps fading toward a steady state; still readily in stock with no fresh catalyst.

rows.name: Alice layout
rows.note: Slow bleed continues as ergo-curious buyers pivot toward true split boards; Orca Echo's momentum compounds the pull.

rows.name: GMK CYL Masterpiece R2
rows.note: Post-close fade one week further out from the June 26 close; production queue now the only open question.

rows.name: GMK CYL Pandemonium
rows.note: GB closed on schedule July 1; entering the normal post-close fade with a Q1 2027 ship estimate.

rows.name: DCS Dolch
rows.note: GB closed on schedule July 1 via Divinikey; post-close fade begins with an October 2026 ship estimate.

rows.name: Work Louder x OpenAI Codex Micro
rows.note: OpenAI's first branded hardware — a Work Louder-built macro pad teased June 29 — pulls outside-press attention into the enthusiast space ahead of its July 15 launch.

rows.name: GMK CYL Selene
rows.note: Further post-close fade continues with no production update to re-engage community attention this week.

rows.name: Cherry MX2A
rows.note: Continued slow bleed as Hall effect and magnetic alternatives dominate new gaming-board specs, with no launch to arrest the decline.

rows.name: Prototypist
rows.note: Summer Sale (40% off, June 19–28) has ended; Pandemonium and Gateron Lanes stock traffic settling back to baseline.

rows.name: CannonKeys
rows.note: Quiet window continues with no new group buy announced since the GMK Spark and Link closes; vendor pipeline remains between launches.

rows.name: Wuque Studio
rows.note: Mammoth V2 and Promise V2 remain listed as in-development; no dated announcement or IC this week, slow bleed continues.

rows.name: Cherry (GMK parent)
rows.note: GMK production backlog for Selene, Pandemonium, and Masterpiece R2 keeps the brand present but passive amid continued Hall-effect headwinds.
